purpose: Single-factor Line9 realism calibration starting from the project-owner accepted FORMAL06C morphology.

provenance.conditioning_scope: Visual and spectral realism target only; no measured array is read by the generator.

locked_factor_groups: cover, weathered-cap, and bedrock material deck
grid, PML, acquisition, and solver time window
basal path arrays and transition-thickness arrays
changed_factor_group: Depth-tapered multiscale aperiodic non-target middle-cover texture only.
visual_gate: Use identical crop, colour scale, and processing for FORMAL06C, FORMAL08A, and Line9.
Review raw, restrained time-power gain, and background-suppressed views.
Require a laterally continuous multicycle basal packet in full_scene, not only in full-minus-control.
Reject new hyperbola-like fragments, regular slabs, interface dropout, or a blank non-target background.
Record project-owner decision before any distributed or dense solve.
claim_boundary: Useful for measured-realism development and ablation. It is permanently ineligible for an unseen-Line9 claim.
